message:
feat(installer): add --strict flag for legacy checksum behavior

Add --strict flag that treats ALL tools as CRITICAL, causing any
checksum mismatch to abort installation immediately.

This provides:
- Security-conscious mode for users who want no exceptions
- CI/CD reproducibility (no silent tool skipping)
- Compliance/auditing scenarios

The flag sets ACFS_STRICT_MODE=true which is already honored by:
- handle_tool_failure() in tools.sh
- handle_all_checksum_mismatches() in security.sh
- handle_checksum_mismatch() in security.sh

Related: bead 8mv

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@
 #   --reset-state     Delete state file and exit (for debugging)
 #   --interactive     Enable interactive prompts for resume decisions
 #   --skip-preflight  Skip pre-flight system validation
+#   --strict          Treat ALL tools as critical (any checksum mismatch aborts)
 # ============================================================
 
 set -euo pipefail
@@ -338,6 +339,12 @@ parse_args() {
                 export ACFS_INTERACTIVE=true
                 shift
                 ;;
+            --strict)
+                # Treat all tools as critical - any checksum mismatch aborts
+                # Related: bead 8mv, tools.sh ACFS_STRICT_MODE handling
+                export ACFS_STRICT_MODE=true
+                shift
+                ;;
             --skip-preflight)
                 SKIP_PREFLIGHT=true
                 shift
